calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-19-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Diane Elan Wick, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Not Reported. (611)

APPEARANCES:
Plaintiff/Respondent Catalina Perez is present In Propria Persona.
Defendant/Appellant Peter Koehler, Owner of PP&M Towing & Recovery DBA P&S Towing and Recovery, is present In Propria Persona.
No witnesses are present.

This matter comes on calendar for a trial de novo. Both parties are sworn and give testimony on their own behalf. The court questions litigants as to their testimony.

The following Plaintiff's exhibits are marked during the proceedings;
1 - Letter from Plaintiff Perez to P&S Towing, dated 9/24/07 (2 pages)
2 - Page 7 of 15 of CC&R for St. Francis Square
3 - St. Francis Square Rules & Regulations (Received 5/19/08)

The following Defense exhibits are marked during the proceedings;
4 - PP&M Towing Report Re: Tow of Plaintiff's Vehicle, dated 7/19/07 (2 pages)
5 - Ca DMV Print-Out of VC22658
6 - "To Tow or Not To Tow - That is a Question of Liability" (5 pages)

Ms. Perez is to send the court a copy of the member regulations for her co-op.

Upon hearing all argument and receiving all evidence, the court takes this matter under submission.

5/19/08 - Plaintiff provides the court with a copy St. Francis Square's Rules and Regulations.

5/19/08 - JUDGMENT ENTERED IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT.
